tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using May.
tasks.hindiPrompt: May का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: It may rain today. May I come in? He may be right. May I ask a question? They may come today.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using May.
tasks.hindiPrompt: May का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: May I take this? The weather may change. May I go, sir? She may come late. May I use your pen?

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "हो सकता है कि वह सही हो।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "May I ask a question? yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using May.
tasks.hindiPrompt: May का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: May God keep you happy. You may succeed. May I sit here? This may be true.
